description: Style Note These simple and well fitted trousers is a wardrobe essential. Can be easily styled with tops, tunics and shirts, you can get a semi formal or a completely casual look with these pants. Look your trendiest best with these trousers from Kraus. Product Details Beige trousers, has a button with crystal embellishment and zipped closure, decorative buttons with crystal embellishments in front, belt loops around the waist, two insert pockets in front and two patch pockets at the back Material and Care Blended Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Do not bleach Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
